---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case that this feature would support. How would this be
beneficial to you and other users?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, code examples, or references to related work here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have considered whether this fits within the project's scope.
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional).
